Parrotrans House All translation services Parrotrans is a highly experienced international team of translators in providing accurate translation services using high quality language. Contact us

Our Services

Text Translation

With a team of experienced translators, and a commitment to accuracy and attention to detail, we can help you communicate effectively and professionally to achieve your goal.

Translation equipment selling

High-quality equipment will serve your needs for your events and conferences, you can buy them or ask for rent with certain count based on your expected attendees



Live Translation

Covering legal, corporate and governmental fields. You can count on our expert translators to attend a session with you or call

About Parrotrans

We provide professional translation services to businesses and individuals worldwide. Parrotrans is a team of experienced translators who are passionate about breaking down language barriers and helping our clients communicate effectively in any language.

Our Clients

What is an online casino without limit?

When playing at an online casino au-onlinecasino.org/, you will face limits in various situations. Even the best, most customer-friendly providers set limits. For example, for money transfers and bets. Based on these values, you can see how much money you can deposit and withdraw at the casino or how high your bet can be on the available games.

In the summer of 2021, a new gambling law was introduced in Australia. Casinos that are equipped with a Australian license must adhere to the strict requirements of the GlüStv. Among other things, the authorities set limits that must be taken into account by providers and players alike. Here is an overview of the new limits:

Parrotrans is a growing, Turky based translation agency, a B2B service provider of complex language services. Our agency is located in Gaziantep.
